subcodes.first_line: A Book from Our presence unto him who hath attained unto the Most Great Ocean, when he turned towards the Dawning-Place of Eternity, Who hath come from the realm of might [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب من لدنا لمن فاز بالبحر الاعظم اذ توجه الی مطلع القدم الذی اتی من جبروت
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @suffering and imprisonment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @idolatry, @prayer for specific individuals; groups
